author: Trung Nguyen
name: 11L EMA + LeakyReLU² + LZMA + Int6 GPTQ-lite
blurb: 11L/512d Transformer with LeakyReLU(0.5)² MLP, EMA averaging, BigramHash(2048), XSA on last 4 layers, Partial RoPE (16/64), Value Embedding, SmearGate, U-Net skips, GPTQ-lite int6 quantization with LZMA compression. Temperature scaling T=0.90 for evaluation.
